description: CompositionBlue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis sporty T-shirt from adidas is the answer to up your casual style - the contrast graphic print looks great, making you stand out in a crowd. And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable fabric will keep you fresh throughout the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18”
